title: Sweethearts on Parade
actors: Ray Middleton, Lucille Norman, Eileen Christy
plot: Cam Ellerby (Ray Middleton) brings his traveling medicine show to town and it spells glamor and excitement to young Sylvia Townsend (Eileen Christy). Her mother, Kathleen (Lucille Norman), recalls the days when she was part of a s...
